items.title: SunSport’s World Cup team of the tournament revealed including England star, wantaway Chelsea ace and veteran hero, 40
items.summary: THE World Cup is over with Spain emerging as winners after an incredible tournament. Several big-name stars have delivered brilliant performances across the last six weeks in North America. From the usual suspects, to new heroes, plenty of players have catapulted themselves to even greater stardom.

items.title: Kevin Keegan was a God in Newcastle and his iconic ‘I would love it rant’ only made Geordies love him more
items.summary: WHEN Kevin Keegan netted twice against Newcastle to help Liverpool to a 3-0 victory in the 1974 FA Cup final, it seemed inconceivable that it would be on Tyneside where he became a football God. items.summary: ENGLAND notched their best finish at a World Cup since 1966 - but some members of the squad still failed to live up to expectations. items.title: Lamine Yamal dances wildly and Spain hero trolls Donald Trump as TWO MILLION fans line streets for World Cup bus parade

items.title: England must SACK Thomas Tuchel if Pep Guardiola wants job – if he goes to Italy it will be the biggest miss of all time
items.summary: IT WOULD be easy for the FA to do nothing. But if they do and see Pep Guardiola taking up the Italy offer being plotted by Paolo Maldini, they will regret it forever.
